title: chrysanthemum × leucanthum
intro: Chrysanthemum × leucanthum, also known as Shevachman's chrysanthemum or Shasta daisy, is a hybrid flower that is a cross between Chrysanthemum leucanthemum and Chrysanthemum maximum. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum × leucanthum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, lower blood pressure, and reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
